description: Create .kiro/steering/ files for the project to guide follow-up PRs. These files document the architecture decisions, coding conventions, deployment process, and data model for future development.
steps: Create .kiro/steering/architecture.md documenting: the Nx monorepo structure, the serverless architecture (API Gateway + Lambda + DynamoDB), the frontend hosting (S3 + CloudFront), authentication flow (Cognito), encryption approach (KMS for DynamoDB and S3). Include a diagram of the system components.

Create .kiro/steering/conventions.md documenting: TypeScript strict mode, Angular standalone components with OnPush, SCSS for styles, rm- prefix for Angular selectors, shared types in libs/shared, Lambda handler patterns (routing, CORS, error handling), CDK patterns (construct organization, naming), import/export conventions.

Create .kiro/steering/data-model.md documenting: the DynamoDB table design, partition key (userId) and sort key (id), GSI design, the Recipe interface and all sub-interfaces, access patterns supported (list by user, get by id, filter by category), and guidance for adding new fields or indexes.

Create .kiro/steering/deployment.md documenting: prerequisites (AWS CLI, credentials), build commands, CDK bootstrap and deploy commands, environment configuration (how to set API URL and Cognito IDs in the frontend), CloudFront invalidation after frontend updates.
Create .kiro/steering/testing.md documenting: testing strategy and conventions, how to add unit tests for Lambda handlers, how to add component tests for Angular, integration testing approach.
acceptance_criteria: .kiro/steering/architecture.md exists and describes the full system architecture
.kiro/steering/data-model.md exists and documents the DynamoDB schema
verification: Verify all 5 steering files exist: ls /projects/sandbox/recipe-manager/.kiro/steering/
Verify each file has meaningful content (not empty): wc -l /projects/sandbox/recipe-manager/.kiro/steering/*.md
findings: All 5 steering files created with detailed, accurate content referencing actual project paths, interfaces, and patterns. Total 783 lines across 5 files.
